tools.name: apiInfo.get
tools.description: Responds with all supported endpoints URLs for v2 version.

tools.name: assessmentData.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsActivitiesResponses
tools.description: Responds with all learner activity attempts for open response activities in an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: assessmentData.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsMarksAssignments
tools.description: Responds with all learner assessment marks in an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: assessmentData.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsMarksQuizzes
tools.description: Responds with all learner quiz marks in an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: assessmentData.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsSubmissionsAssignments
tools.description: Responds with all learner assessment submissions and marks, if any, in an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: assessmentData.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsSubmissionsOpenResponseAssessmentId
tools.description: Responds with all learner assessment submissions and marks, if any, in a specified open response assessment.

tools.name: assessmentData.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsSubmissionsUserEmailAssignmentsAssessmentId
tools.description: Responds with the learner's assessment submission and any marks for the submission.

tools.name: assessmentGroups.deleteOfferingsOfferingIdGroupsGroupIdLearnersUserEmail
tools.description: Removes a learner from the specified assessment group.

tools.name: assessmentGroups.getOfferingsOfferingIdGroups
tools.description: Responds with a list of assessment groups in an offering.

tools.name: assessmentGroups.getOfferingsOfferingIdGroupsGroupIdLearners
tools.description: Responds with a list of learners in a specified assessment group.

tools.name: assessmentGroups.postOfferingsOfferingIdGroups
tools.description: Creates a new assessment group in an offering.

tools.name: assessmentGroups.postOfferingsOfferingIdGroupsGroupIdLearners
tools.description: Adds a learner into the specified assessment group.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.deleteOfferingsOfferingIdAssessmentsAssessmentIdDocumentsDocumentId
tools.description: Removes the assessment document file for a specified assessment in an offering.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.deleteOfferingsOfferingIdUsersUserEmailAssessmentsAssessmentId
tools.description: Resets the user's submitted assessment to a draft state.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.getOfferingsOfferingIdActivitiesOpenresponse
tools.description: Responds with the activities in a specific offering.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.getOfferingsOfferingIdAssessments
tools.description: Responds with all assessments in an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.getOfferingsOfferingIdLearnersPendingSubmission
tools.description: Responds with learners who have one or more assessments due x days before the due date, with each assessment that is due, where x = the number of days specified in the request. The default is 3 days.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.getOfferingsOfferingIdUsersUserEmailSubmissionsOpenResponse
tools.description: Responds with open response assessment submissions by a learner in an offering.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.patchOfferingsOfferingIdAssessmentsAssessmentId
tools.description: Updates the assessment details for a specified assessment in an offering.

tools.name: assessmentManagement.patchOfferingsOfferingIdAssessmentsAssessmentIdUserEmail
tools.description: Updates the due dates for a learner's quiz attempt specified by the assessmentId.

tools.name: badges.getOfferingsOfferingIdBadges
tools.description: Responds with the badge for an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: badges.getUsersUserEmailBadges
tools.description: Responds with all badges that the specified user has been awarded.

tools.name: badges.postOfferingsOfferingIdUsersUserEmailBadgesAward
tools.description: Awards a badge to a user in the offering.

tools.name: channels.deleteOfferingsOfferingIdChannelsChannelIdLearners
tools.description: Removes a learner from the specified group channel.

tools.name: channels.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsChannelsChannelIdComments
tools.description: Responds with a list of comments made in any posts in a specified channel, within an offering.

tools.name: channels.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsChannelsChannelIdPosts
tools.description: Responds with a list of posts made in a specified channel, within an offering.

tools.name: channels.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsChannelsChannelIdReplies
tools.description: Responds with a list of replies to comments in any posts in a specified channel, within an offering.

tools.name: channels.getOfferingsOfferingIdChannels
tools.description: Responds with a list of channels in an offering.

tools.name: channels.getOfferingsOfferingIdChannelsChannelIdLearners
tools.description: Finds all learners in a specified group channel.

tools.name: channels.patchOfferingsOfferingIdChannelsChannelId
tools.description: Updates a channel in an offering.

tools.name: channels.postOfferingsOfferingIdChannels
tools.description: Adds new channel to the specified offering.

tools.name: channels.postOfferingsOfferingIdChannelsChannelIdLearners
tools.description: Adds a learner to a specified group channel.

tools.name: courseMappings.deleteCourseMappingsOfferingIdExternalCourseId
tools.description: Removes the course mapping between the offering and the externalCourseId.

tools.name: courseMappings.getCourseMappings
tools.description: Returns all course mappings for course offerings.

tools.name: courseMappings.getCourseMappingsExternalcourseExternalCourseId
tools.description: Responds with course mapping details by externalCourseId.

tools.name: courseMappings.getCourseMappingsOfferingId
tools.description: Responds with course mapping details by offeringId.

tools.name: courseMappings.putCourseMappingsOfferingIdExternalCourseId
tools.description: Creates a mapping between the offering and the externalCourseId.

tools.name: courseMetadata.putCoursesContentIdMetadataCategory
tools.description: Add or update course category in the metadata of a course.

tools.name: courseMetadata.putCoursesContentIdMetadataLevel
tools.description: Add or update the course level in the metadata of a course.

tools.name: courseMetadata.putCoursesContentIdMetadataTags
tools.description: Add or update course tags in the metadata of a course.

tools.name: courseMetadata.putCoursesContentIdMetadataTopic
tools.description: Add or update the course topic in the metadata of a course.

tools.name: courses.getCourses
tools.description: Responds with all courses (draft and published.)

tools.name: courses.getCoursesContentId
tools.description: Responds with a course matching the contentId.

tools.name: courses.getCoursesContentIdActivations
tools.description: Responds with all activations for the contentId provided.

tools.name: courses.getCoursesContentIdPermissions
tools.description: Responds with users who have access to a specific course by contentId.

tools.name: courses.postCoursesRootContentIdPermissionsUserEmail
tools.description: Provide a user with access to a specific course by rootContentId.

tools.name: learnerActivity.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsLearnersProgress
tools.description: Responds with all learner progress in the offering.

tools.name: learnerActivity.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsSocialNotes
tools.description: Responds with all shared social notes in a specified offering.

tools.name: learnerActivity.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsUnitReactions
tools.description: Responds with user reactions to units in a specified offering.

tools.name: learnerActivity.getUsersAllProgress
tools.description: Responds with all learners' progress in all offerings.

tools.name: learnerActivity.getUsersUserEmailOfferingsOfferingIdProgress
tools.description: Responds with the learner's progress in a specified offering.

tools.name: learnerActivity.getUsersUserEmailProgress
tools.description: Responds with the specified learner's progress in all offerings.

tools.name: offeringLearners.deleteOfferingsOfferingIdUsersMarkerEmailMarks
tools.description: Removes an array of learners from coach's marking list.

tools.name: offeringLearners.deleteOfferingsOfferingIdUsersUserEmail
tools.description: Removes a user from the offering.

tools.name: offeringLearners.getOfferingsOfferingIdUsers
tools.description: Responds with a list of users in the offering (facilitators, learners and markers.).

tools.name: offeringLearners.getOfferingsOfferingIdUsersMarkerEmailMarks
tools.description: Responds with all learners marked by the specified coach.

tools.name: offeringLearners.patchUsersUserEmailTransfer
tools.description: Moves the user's access and progress from one offering to another.

tools.name: offeringLearners.postOfferingsOfferingIdUsers
tools.description: Adds one or more users to the offering.

tools.name: offeringLearners.postOfferingsOfferingIdUsersMarkerEmailMarks
tools.description: Adds an array of learners to be marked by the specified coach.

tools.name: offeringMetadata.putOfferingsOfferingIdMetadataCategory
tools.description: Updates the offering category metadata.

tools.name: offeringMetadata.putOfferingsOfferingIdMetadataLevel
tools.description: Updates the offering level metadata.

tools.name: offeringMetadata.putOfferingsOfferingIdMetadataTags
tools.description: Updates the offering tags metadata.

tools.name: offeringMetadata.putOfferingsOfferingIdMetadataTopic
tools.description: Updates the offering topic metadata.

tools.name: offerings.getOfferings
tools.description: Responds with all offerings for your organisation.

tools.name: offerings.getOfferingsCurrent
tools.description: Responds with active offerings for your organisation.

tools.name: offerings.getOfferingsFuture
tools.description: Responds with scheduled offerings for your organisation. Scheduled offerings have a start date after today's date (inclusive).

tools.name: offerings.getOfferingsInfoTextPattern
tools.description: Find offerings where info field matches the specified text pattern.

tools.name: offerings.getOfferingsOfferingId
tools.description: Responds with an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: offerings.getOfferingsPast
tools.description: Responds with past offerings for your organisation.

tools.name: offerings.getOfferingsSummary
tools.description: Responds with a summary of all offerings for your organisation.

tools.name: offerings.patchOfferingsOfferingId
tools.description: Updates the offering.

tools.name: offerings.postOfferings
tools.description: Creates a new offering.

tools.name: organisation.getOrg
tools.description: Returns the current organisation info.

tools.name: pulses.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsPulses
tools.description: Responds with the IDs of all pulses that learners have responded to in a specified offering.

tools.name: pulses.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsPulsesPulseIdResponses
tools.description: Responds with pulse's responses, matching the pulseId, in an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: pulses.getOfferingsOfferingIdAnalyticsPulsesResponses
tools.description: Responds with pulse's responses in an offering matching the offeringId.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.getUsersUserEmail
tools.description: Responds with a user matching the specified email.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.getUsersUserEmailOfferings
tools.description: Responds with all offerings that the user in.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.patchUsersUserEmail
tools.description: Updates the specified user by email.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.postUsers
tools.description: Creates a new user.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.postUsersUserEmailInviteEmail
tools.description: Re-sends an invitation e-mail to the specified user.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.postUsersUserEmailOfferings
tools.description: Adds a user to an array of offerings by offeringId.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.postUsersUserEmailPermissionsPermissionName
tools.description: Adds additional permissions to the specified user.

tools.name: usersInIQualify.putUsersUserEmailSuspend
tools.description: Suspends the specified user's account.

tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source
